last_completed.summary: H5: Planner-driven E2E for method-receiver dispatch. e2e_concolic now drives a real analyze → plan → execute roundtrip against examples/go/service-method via the Go frontend subprocess. Additive Command::Execute.plan and ExecuteResult.outcome on Rust; Go launcher dispatches method targets through the wrapper's receiver-kind switch driven by plan.receiver_kind; method targets without a plan now emit runtime_failed with short_reason containing "unknown receiver kind", retiring the pre-H5 unsupported/method_not_supported rejection. Followups str-yi9y, str-oegu filed P2 blocked-by str-ekjh. Pre-existing cli:clippy failure unrelated (str-7syr).

next_action: Create the next task branch from the rebased expedition base branch.
